message:
fix(telemetry/score): divide by weight_sum exactly once

calculate_compilation_score() ended with the effective no-op

    score / weight_sum * weight_sum

so partial-component runs (where weight_sum < 1.0) returned a score
scaled *down* by the component weight instead of normalized to the
reference 1000. Concretely: a release-only benchmark on
reference-hardware timings (10s) produced ~600 instead of ~1000, and
debug-only (5s) produced ~250 instead of ~1000.

Collapse the redundant multiplication and tighten the three partial-
benchmark tests to assert the correct ~1000 reference-band. The
previous test ranges (200–300, 120–180, "> 0") encoded the bug.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
